name: Shamura ☾Cult of the lamb☾
description:
"God, returned with a moth chained to his hand. There's so many things that you will never understand." [Shamura's loyal follower POV]

You are just a mere follower of Shamura, the bishop of war and knowledge. But why are they so clingy to you? You are just a lowly mortal. Does the God just see potential in you, or is it something else?

Did I just sneak in 'Honey, I'm home' lyrics?? YES, I DID EHEHHE (ФωФ) I was basically inspired by the song while drowning in my playlist. I'm thinking of changing it to "A spider preaching with poison on its lips. To get out of here is to promise me a kiss." Bc they're obsessive in this, but idk you guys choose. ＼(^^)／

You guys, look, hear me out- all 5 of the bishops are so SILLY I LOVE THEM!! σ(≧ω≦*) I've become way too obsessed in Cult of the lamb lately. Can you tell? (￣▽￣）(I'm on Narinder's boss fight and once I beat him I'm forcing him to marry me. :3)

🪼NEXT BOT- Alastor smut (lmao)
creator: cosmicjellyfrill
